name: how-to-test-negative-for-stupid
description: Senator John Kennedy's 'How to Test Negative for Stupid: And Why Washington Never Will' — a hilarious, brutally honest look inside Washington D.C. from a U.S. Senator who refuses to take himself too seriously.
useCase: Understand how Washington really works, laugh at the absurdity of D.C., and learn what it takes to fix our broken political system.
knownRisks: Strongly partisan from a conservative/Louisiana perspective — may not appeal across the political spectrum
Satirical and humorous — not a serious policy analysis
Specific to U.S. federal government — limited relevance outside America
